title: Eclectic Trove (Legendary Tooltips)
description: Adds 10 various custom frames for use with Legendary Tooltips.
body:
This resource pack requires the mod Legendary Tooltips.  Download it here:

https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips

This resource pack replaces the default "level 0" border built into Legendary Tooltips, and provides 9 additional custom borders for use as you see fit for your game/modpack.  If you would like to use this resource pack without worrying about configuration, download the "noconfig" version of the pack.  This version contains a built-in configuration that works well for vanilla and some mods.

If you would like more granular control over what items show what borders, please note that you will need to configure Legendary Tooltips yourself.  Documentation can be found here, please read that first.

 

The borders in this pack are quite varied (see images). Here are all of the borders included, with their associated configuration numbers:

0.  Gold frame
1.  Silver frame
2.  Copper frame
3.  Smoke and flames
4.  Water / Ice
5.  Rose and vines
6.  Bones / death
7.  Iron plating / machinery
8.  Purple geometric motif
9.  Holy (halo / wings)

 

The suggested border colors are as follows.  I highly suggest these are used--copy / paste this section into the border colors section of Legendary Tooltips' configuration file.

 

FORGE

Legendary Tooltips version 1.3 and later

    level0_colors = ["20_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922_#FF996922+v64-s32_#FF996922", "20_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF5A3A1D_#FF996922+v64-s32", "#D0996922-v155", "#F45A3A1D-v55"]
